references.text: Mazo, KRF & LG Aribal. 2025. Rediscoveries, lectotypifications and new species record of the genus Saurauia (Actinidiaceae) from southwestern Philippines. Phytotaxa 704: 69-78.

Mazo, KRF, JA Mansibang, LG Aribal & MN Tamayo. 2021. You ‘Sau’ Me! A new species and a rediscovery in the genus Saurauia (Actinidiaceae) from Zamboanga Peninsula, Mindanao Island, Philippines. Webbia 76: 209-212
Olimpos, SM, DS Penneys, DS Salas, FP Coritico, VB Amoroso & PW Fritsch. 2024. Saurauia decolorata (Actinidiaceae), a new species from Mindanao, the Philippines. Phytotaxa 658: 99-108.
Steenis, CGGJ van. 1948. Actinidiaceae. Flora Malesiana, Series 1, 4: 37-39
